title: melinaurtado/VisFieldFacialExpCollect: Initial Release - Version Employed for Data Collection
author: Boratto Urtado, Melina
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This is the first release of the Visual Field Restriction Data Collection Software. The software was developed to collect data for the experiment titled "Exploring the Visual Field Restriction in the Recognition of Basic Facial Expressions: A Combined Eye Tracking and Gaze Contingency Study" by M. B. Urtado, R. D. Rodrigues, and S. S. Fukusima. 
 Please, when utilizing this data collection software, we kindly request citing the following article: Urtado, M.B.; Rodrigues, R.D.; Fukusima, S.S.  Visual Field Restriction in the Recognition of Basic Facial Expressions: A Combined Eye Tracking and Gaze Contingency Study .  Behavioral Sciences   2024 ,  14 , 355.  https://doi.org/10.3390/bs14050355  
 Key features of this release include: 
 
 Collection of data under three visual field restriction conditions: NVR, PFFV, and FV. 
 Implemented with PsychoPy for experiment execution. 
 The support for Eye Tribe's ET1000 Eye Tracker as the moving window controller requires the manufacturer's driver. 
 
 Please refer to the README.md file for detailed information on requirements, experimental parameters, project organization, and licensing. 
 Note: Due to licensing restrictions, the facial images used in the original experiment cannot be included in this repository. Please follow the instructions in the README.md file to obtain and replace these images.
steps_raw:
This is the first release of the Visual Field Restriction Data Collection Software. The software was developed to collect data for the experiment titled "Exploring the Visual Field Restriction in the Recognition of Basic Facial Expressions: A Combined Eye Tracking and Gaze Contingency Study" by M. B. Urtado, R. D. Rodrigues, and S. S. Fukusima. 
 Please, when utilizing this data collection software, we kindly request citing the following article: Urtado, M.B.; Rodrigues, R.D.; Fukusima, S.S.  Visual Field Restriction in the Recognition of Basic Facial Expressions: A Combined Eye Tracking and Gaze Contingency Study .  Behavioral Sciences   2024 ,  14 , 355.  https://doi.org/10.3390/bs14050355  
 Key features of this release include: 
 
 Collection of data under three visual field restriction conditions: NVR, PFFV, and FV. 
 Implemented with PsychoPy for experiment execution. 
 The support for Eye Tribe's ET1000 Eye Tracker as the moving window controller requires the manufacturer's driver. 
 
 Please refer to the README.md file for detailed information on requirements, experimental parameters, project organization, and licensing. 
 Note: Due to licensing restrictions, the facial images used in the original experiment cannot be included in this repository. Please follow the instructions in the README.md file to obtain and replace these images.
